title: S4a: migrate decision-memory (9 anchors, 0 unparsed — the cleanest area of the nine)
action: Standard area migration, per the loop proven by f2-3 (commit 8710d03) — read that commit as the worked example. TARGET: docs/specs/decision-memory.md. It was mis-filed 'shapeless' by an earlier blind sweep; the widened classifier reads 9 rules, 0 unparsed. STEP 0 (before any edit): record `git rev-parse HEAD` as pin commit, copy the source verbatim to docs/history/okf-migration-f2/sources/decision-memory.md, `git hash-object` it as blob_sha, run --inventory and record counts AND unparsed_blocks, add the pin to PIN_REGISTRY with scheme ba-nine-section and full expected_counts INCLUDING unparsed_blocks. Expect 9 anchors / 0 unparsed — if materially different, STOP and report rather than bending expected_counts. STEP 1: author concepts under docs/knowledge/areas/decision-memory/ split by TOPIC not by heading; all 9 anchors land in exactly one concept's bee.sources. Frontmatter through emitFrontmatter (canonical, zero not_canonical). Unique bee.id, one bee.authoritative_for per subject. Carry-over: area->bee.areas, decisions->bee.decisions, sources+parity_*->bee.sources, updated->timestamp, coverage dropped. KEEP TERMINOLOGY VERBATIM — the fidelity floor is lexical; migration re-homes, it does not rewrite. STEP 2: replace the source with a pointer stub carrying the FULL anchor map (D37), update its reading-map.md row, grep skills/ scripts/ hooks/ .bee/bin/ AGENTS.md docs/specs/ for anchor citations and rewire live ones (docs/history/** stays archive; a citation that resolves through the stub's anchor row is already correct — do not churn release machinery for it, per f2-3's precedent). STEP 3: add the --check decision-memory entry to EXTRA_SUITES and its args-pin to MANDATORY_SUITE_ARGS. STEP 4: `bee knowledge index`, log.md dated entry, full chain. RED-FIRST: run the gate with one anchor deliberately unassigned and capture the LOST output before completing.

truths: red evidence: the gate RED with one anchor unassigned — output quoted
fidelity min/median quoted, above the 0.60 floor, with no concept edited to reach it
knowledge check 0 errors 0 warnings; index --check 0 stale
the stub keeps docs/specs/decision-memory.md alive with the full anchor map
pin declares unparsed_blocks; committed copy's git hash-object matches blob_sha
prohibitions: never delete the source path (stub replaces content, D20)
never edit a concept or lower a threshold to clear the fidelity floor
do not bend expected_counts to match a surprising measurement — report instead

trace.outcome: decision-memory migrated to docs/knowledge/areas/decision-memory/ (1 concept, 9/9 anchors owned, fidelity 1.000, telemetry inside band); stub + chain gate wired; test_okf_pins.mjs refusal assertions retired for decision-memory
